resources.string: This addon is already in the list
Please confirm the changes on your TV to apply them.
Your addon configuration has been updated on the TV.
Your repository configuration has been updated on the TV.
The changes were declined on the TV. Your list has been reverted.
Failed to save. Check your connection to the TV.
No response from the TV. Please try again.
The TV server is no longer reachable. The changes may have been applied.
This repository is already in the list
Create and manage your custom collections
Your collections have been updated on the TV.
Expected a JSON array of collections
Collection \"{collection}\", folder \"{folder}\": \"sources\" must be an array
Collection \"{collection}\", folder \"{folder}\", source {index}: missing required fields (addonId, type, catalogId)
Collection \"{collection}\", folder \"{folder}\", source {index}: missing TMDB source type
Collection \"{collection}\", folder \"{folder}\", source {index}: missing Trakt list ID
Imported {count} collection(s). Review and hit Save Changes to apply.
No addons installed. Add one to get started.
No catalog addons installed. Install a catalog addon to see content.
You have been signed out of Nuvio. Please sign in again.
You have been signed out of Trakt. Please reconnect.
This id could not load details because none of the installed addons returned metadata.
try another addon, disable \"Prefer external meta addon\" in Layout settings, or confirm an installed addon supports this id.
No installed addon supports metadata for
No installed addon could provide metadata for id=
install or update an addon that supports this content type, then retry.
install an addon that supports this id, or reconfigure/update the addon and retry.
does not have metadata for this id
open this id from a different addon, disable \"Prefer external meta addon\", or check that the addon supports this id.
check your internet connection, verify the addon URL still works, then retry.
make sure the addon server is online and reachable, then retry.
retry in a moment, or try a different addon if this keeps happening.
uses an insecure HTTP connection that Android blocked
switch the addon URL to HTTPS or update the addon configuration.
retry, update or reinstall the addon, or try a different addon.
No installed addon supports metadata for \"%1$s\".
No installed addon could provide metadata for id=%1$s (type=%2$s).
Tried meta addons: %1$s. None of them provided metadata for id=%2$s (type=%3$s).
Tried meta addons: %1$s. Metadata could not be loaded for id=%2$s (type=%3$s).
Tried meta addons: %1$s. Metadata could not be loaded for id=%2$s (type=%3$s). Issues: %4$s.
No installed addon supports streams for \"%1$s\".
Tried stream addons: %1$s. None of them returned streams for id=%2$s (type=%3$s).
Tried stream addons: %1$s. Streams could not be loaded for id=%2$s (type=%3$s).
Tried stream addons: %1$s. Streams could not be loaded for id=%2$s (type=%3$s). Issues: %4$s.
Choose what you want to do with this item.
Mark previous in this season as watched
No watched episodes in this season
Pick an episode to view its Trakt reviews
Couldn\'t load Trakt reviews right now.
Spoiler review. Press OK to reveal.
ISO 3166-1 country code where the title is available. Example: US, GB.
Use TMDB watch provider IDs. Separate multiple with commas for AND, or pipes for OR.
TMDB does not currently have browseable titles for this selection.
Select which lists should include this title.
Restart the app to apply the language change.
Choose your color theme, font and language
Pick the accent color used across the app
Use pure black for app backgrounds
Also make cards, panels, and containers pure black
Choose the typeface and locale used throughout the app
App information, updates, and legal links
Made with ❤️ by Tapframe and friends
Data sources, acknowledgements, and Android licenses
Data providers, service credits, and Android playback licenses used by Nuvio TV.
Source code and license terms are available in the project repository. Licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0.

Nuvio uses the TMDB API for movie and TV metadata, artwork, trailers, cast, production details, collections, and recommendations. This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
Nuvio connects to Trakt for account authentication, watched history, progress sync, library data, ratings, lists, and comments. Nuvio is not affiliated with or endorsed by Trakt.
Nuvio uses MDBList for ratings and external score provider data. Nuvio is not affiliated with or endorsed by MDBList.
Nuvio uses the IntroDB API for community-provided intro, recap, credits, and preview timestamps used by skip controls. Nuvio is not affiliated with or endorsed by IntroDB.

Nuvio uses IMDb Non-Commercial Datasets, including title.ratings.tsv.gz, for IMDb ratings and vote counts. Information courtesy of IMDb (https://www.imdb.com). Used with permission. IMDb data is for personal and non-commercial use under IMDb terms.
Used as an Android playback engine. Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Used as an Android playback engine. The libmpv-android wrapper is licensed under the MIT license; mpv/libmpv and bundled native components retain their upstream license terms.
Start simple or unlock every customization. You can switch anytime.
Focused setup, add-ons, playback basics, Trakt, and account settings.
Full settings, layout controls, catalog order, collections, plug-ins, and diagnostics.
Simple playback, subtitle, audio, and P2P preferences.
Choose manually or autoplay the first available stream.
Continue to the next episode after a stream finishes.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
An account with this email already exists.
Please enter a valid email address.
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
QR login expired. Please try again.
This QR login was requested from another device.
QR login service is outdated. Reapply TV login SQL setup.
QR login backend is missing setup. Update TV login SQL setup.
QR login request was invalid. Please retry.
Connection timed out. Please try again.
Service unavailable. Please try again later.
Invalid request. Please check your input.
Hide advanced setup surfaces without changing your saved values.
Switch to Advanced for the full settings surface.
Show full layout, plug-in, integration, catalog, collection, and tuning settings.
Advanced setup surfaces will be hidden, but your saved settings stay unchanged. You can switch back anytime.
This reveals the full settings surface, including advanced setup, catalog, collection, and tuning controls.
Increase D-pad repeat speed in rows while keeping repeat throttling enabled.
Use Nuvio\'s custom global focus scroll animation and positioning.
Skip disk and network image requests while vertically scrolling home rows.
Flash borders around recomposing UI elements for performance debugging.
Remove cached thumbnails, titles, and enrichment data for Continue Watching
Remember last selected profile at startup
Manage repositories, providers, and plugin states
Configure video playback and subtitle options
The people backing Nuvio and the contributors building it across TV and mobile.
Supporters and donators help keep the project moving, fund infrastructure, and make room for ambitious features.
Nuvio will stay free and open source. If you want to support the project, you can help cover the time and infrastructure behind it.
Open the link on your phone and support Nuvio through Ko-fi.
Point your camera at the QR code or use the button below.
Sponsors help move Nuvio forward through support across the different parts of development.
Show loading screen until first video frame appears.
Show details overlay after 5 seconds while paused.
Show current time and end time while controls are visible.
Use introdb.app to detect intros and recaps.
Skip intros and anime openings automatically.
Skip outros and anime endings automatically.
Player preference, auto-play, and source filtering.
If stream startup fails, switch between ExoPlayer and libmpv automatically.
Switch on start and restore on stop.
Allow display mode changes to match video resolution.
Display reports only one resolution; matching may have no effect.
Auto Frame Rate and resolution matching are both enabled, but your display reports only one refresh rate and one resolution. Neither may take effect, and it is recommended to disable both.
Auto Frame Rate is enabled but your display reports only one refresh rate. Switching may have no effect, and it is recommended to disable.
Resolution matching is enabled but your display reports only one resolution. Matching may have no effect, and it is recommended to disable.
Always open streams in an external app
ExoPlayer for Movies & TV Shows · MPV for Anime
Best compatibility with current Nuvio features.
Uses libmpv with Nuvio OSD controls. Experimental.
Automatically play trailers on the detail screen after a period of inactivity
Requires TMDB enrichment to be enabled
Skip silent portions of audio during playback
Save and restore the in-player audio delay for the current audio output route
These settings may cause issues on some devices. Change only if you know what you\'re doing.
Hardware-level audio/video sync. May improve playback on some Android TV devices
Map Dolby Vision Profile 7 to standard HEVC for devices without DV hardware support
Select how libmpv should use hardware decoders.
Previous default behavior: try direct hardware first, then copy-back.
Safer automatic mode with fallback when some hardware decoders fail.
Uses hardware decoding with copy-back to software memory.
Uses direct hardware decoding. Fastest path on compatible devices.
Disables hardware decoding and uses software decoding only.
Only use built-in hardware decoders. Most compatible but may not support all formats.
Use hardware decoders when available, fall back to FFmpeg. Recommended for most devices.
Use FFmpeg decoders when available. Better format support but higher CPU usage.
Controls whether hardware or software (FFmpeg) decoders are used for audio and video
Prefer forced subtitles when audio matches subtitle language; if unavailable, select nothing
Hide all other subtitles languages from selection list
Use bold font weight for subtitles
Add outline around subtitle text for better visibility
Experimental: advanced ASS/SSA rendering (styles, positioning, animations)
Best quality with HDR support. Renders subtitles on a separate thread.
Animation support using Media3 effects. Faster than Canvas.
Animation support using Media3 effects with Canvas rendering.
Basic subtitle rendering without animation support. Most compatible.
Show subtitles in default addon result order.
Start playback immediately. Selecting addon subtitles may reload the player once.
Prefetch addon subtitles before playback and attach preferred/secondary language tracks.
Prefetch and attach all addon subtitles before playback. Slowest startup.
Auto-play your last working stream for this same movie/episode when cache is still valid
Start next episode automatically when prompt appears.
Try the same source profile first (same addon/quality group) before normal auto-play rules.
Fallback when no outro timestamp exists.
Fallback when no outro timestamp exists.
Wait time for addons before selecting.
Always show source list and let me choose.
Play the first available source automatically.
Play first source whose text matches your regex pattern.
Auto-play can use both installed addons and enabled plugins.
Auto-play only considers streams coming from your installed addons.
Auto-play only considers streams coming from enabled plugins.
Show by playback percent when no outro timestamp is available.
Show this many minutes before episode end when no outro timestamp is available.
Adjust home layout, content visibility, and poster behavior
Browse everything in a vertical grid with a hero section
Fixed hero with a single active row for faster browsing
Switch between portrait and landscape cards for Modern view.
Show a partial preview of the row below in Modern Home layout.
Select one or more catalogs for hero content.
Control what appears on home and search.
Hide sidebar by default; show when focused.
Toggle blur effect for modern sidebar surfaces.
Expand the hero backdrop to fill the entire screen.
Blend artwork colors into the right side of Classic home.
Display hero carousel at top of home.
Adds a Discover section for browsing.
Discover appears inside the Search tab.
Discover gets its own item in the side panel.
Show titles under posters in rows, grid, and see-all.
Show source name under catalog titles.
Show type suffix next to catalog name (Movie/Series).
Hide movies and shows that haven\'t been released yet.
Settings for the detail and episode screens.
Settings for the Continue Watching section.
Use Episode Thumbnails in Continue Watching
Use episode thumbnails as default image. When disabled, uses backdrop.
Blur episode thumbnails until watched to avoid spoilers.
Blur next episode thumbnails in Continue Watching to avoid spoilers.
Show next episode based on the furthest watched episode. Disable for rewatches to use the most recently watched episode instead.
Include upcoming episodes in Continue Watching before they air.
How Continue Watching items are arranged
Released items first, upcoming at the end
Show trailer button on detail page (only when trailer is available).
Use metadata from external addon instead of catalog addon.
For movies, show full release date instead of year only.
Advanced behavior for focused poster cards.
Expand focused poster after idle delay.
How long to wait before expanding focused cards.
Play trailer preview for focused content when available.
Play trailer inside expanded backdrop when available.
Mute trailer audio during autoplay preview.
Mute trailer audio in expanded cards.
Tune card width and corner radius.
Choose where trailer preview plays in Modern Home.
Skip loading new images while scrolling vertically.
Configure external ratings shown in the detail hero
Fetch ratings from external providers in metadata detail screen
Required to fetch ratings from MDBList
Show IMDb score (and hide default IMDb line when available)
Enter your API key to fetch external ratings
Configure your Anime Skip Client ID for anime intro/outro skipping
Required to fetch skip timestamps from anime-skip.com
Create your own Client ID at anime-skip.com/account/settings
Choose which metadata fields should come from TMDB
Use TMDB as a metadata source to enhance addon data
Also apply TMDB enrichment to Modern Home hero and focused cards
Apply TMDB enrichment to Continue Watching items
TMDB metadata language for title, logo, and enabled fields
Logo and backdrop images from TMDB
Description, genres, and rating from TMDB
Runtime, status, country, and language from TMDB
Release and air dates from TMDB
Cast with photos, director, and writer from TMDB
Episode titles, overviews, thumbnails, and runtime from TMDB
Trailer candidates from TMDB videos for the detail trailer section
TMDB recommendation backdrops on detail page
TMDB movie collections in release order
Sync your watchlist, watch progress, continue watching, scrobbles, and personal lists with Trakt.
Go to trakt.tv/activate and enter this code:
Waiting for approval on your phone…
QR login expired. Generate a new code.
Scan QR and sign in on your phone
Could not complete QR sign in
Press Login to start Trakt device authentication. A QR code will appear here.
Choose which progress source powers resume and continue watching
Choose whether resume and continue watching should use Trakt or Nuvio Sync while Trakt scrobbling stays active.
Choose which library to use for saving and viewing your collection
Choose where to save and manage your library items
Watch progress source set to Trakt
Watch progress source set to Nuvio Sync
Trakt history considered for continue watching
Show upcoming episodes before they air
Unaired Next Up episodes are now shown
Unaired Next Up episodes are now hidden
Show Trakt reviews on metadata pages
Choose whether metadata pages should show Trakt reviews when your account is connected.
Trakt reviews on metadata pages are now shown
Trakt reviews on metadata pages are now hidden
Choose where recommendations come from on detail pages
Select the source for recommendations shown on detail pages.
This will disconnect your Trakt account from Nuvio.
Choose how much Trakt activity should appear in continue watching.
Choose whether Continue Watching should include upcoming episodes before release.
Developer tools and feature flags (debug builds only)
Show a simulated playback error popup
Show the Account tab in Settings navigation
Show Generate/Enter Sync Code buttons in Account settings
Sign in with email and password (Supabase auth)
An error occurred during playback.\n\nError: Test simulated error - this is not a real failure. Source returned HTTP 503 (Service Unavailable).
Add random movies/shows to the library for testing
Manage user profiles for this account
Select a profile to edit, switch, or create a new one
Custom avatar URLs can be configured from the Nuvio web panel.
Focus an avatar to view its name
This profile requires a 4-digit PIN before switching.
Set a 4-digit PIN to lock this profile.
Enter a 4-digit PIN and confirm it.
Use your remote or keyboard to enter 4 digits.
Enter current PIN to change PIN for %1$s.
Enter the current 4-digit PIN before setting a new one.
Enter current PIN to remove lock for %1$s.
Enter the current 4-digit PIN to remove this lock.
Enter the current 4-digit PIN before deleting this profile.
This PIN will be required before opening this profile.
Re-enter the same 4 digits to finish setup.
PINs did not match. Enter a new PIN again.
Forgot PIN? Reset it from your Nuvio account on nuvio website.
Install one add-on to start streaming. You can add more later from Addons.
Using primary profile\'s addons and can\'t be changed
Addon URL must start with http or https
No addons installed. Add one to get started.
Scan a QR code to manage addons, catalogs, and collections from your phone
Scan a QR code to install or remove add-ons from your phone
Scan a QR code to manage collections from your phone
Controls catalog and collection row order on Home (Classic + Modern + Grid)
Scan with your phone to manage addons, catalogs, and collections
Scan with your phone to install or remove add-ons
Scan with your phone to manage collections
The following changes were made from your phone:
Pull latest addon changes for current profile
This controls catalog row order on Home (Classic + Modern + Grid).
Catalogs follow addon manifest order. Collections can still be moved between addons.
Try installing more addons to find streams

This stream uses peer-to-peer (P2P) technology. By enabling P2P, you acknowledge and agree that:

• Your IP address will be visible to other peers in the network
• You are solely responsible for the content you access
• You confirm you have the legal right to stream this content in your jurisdiction
• Nuvio does not host, distribute, or control any P2P content
• Nuvio bears no liability for any legal consequences arising from your use of P2P streaming

You use this feature entirely at your own risk. P2P can be disabled anytime in Settings.
Hide buffer, seeds, peers and download speed during loading and playback
This is a one-time download required for P2P streaming.
Audio track init failed - switching to PCM audio…
Decoder init failed - switching to HEVC decoder…
Display step-by-step progress while the player is initializing.
Press Sync when you hear a dialog line.
Select an addon subtitle track first.
Select an addon subtitle track to use Auto Sync.
No subtitle lines were found around this moment.
Amplification is not available on this device
Number of auto-played episodes before prompting.
Press Done on the keyboard to search
Discover is disabled. Enter at least 2 characters
Microphone permission is required for voice search.
Voice search is unavailable on this device.
This removes the list and all list items from Trakt.
Start saving your favorites to see them here
Use + in details to add items to watchlist or lists
Connect your Trakt account in Settings to view your Trakt library
Sync your library, watch progress, addons, and plugins across devices.
Sync is not real-time across active devices. Restart this device after signing in or to pick up changes made elsewhere.
Scan a QR code and complete email login on your phone
Email/password entry on TV is disabled. Continue with QR sign in.
Use your phone to sign in with email/password. TV stays QR-only for faster login.
Scan QR, approve in browser, then return here.
Your account is connected on this TV.
Create a PIN to protect your sync code. Share the code with your other devices.
Enter this code and your PIN on your other device to link them.
Enter the sync code and PIN from your other device to link this device.
Device linked successfully! Your addons and plugins will now sync.
Using primary profile\'s plugins and can\'t be changed
Use plugin providers during stream discovery
In Streams, show one provider per repository instead of one per source
Scan a QR code to add or remove repositories from your phone
Scan with your phone to manage repositories
The following changes were made from your phone:
%1$s is known to cause crashes on some content. Enable anyway?
This will permanently delete this profile and all its data including library, watch history, and addon settings. This cannot be undone.
Try a different catalog or check back later
Allow installs from unknown sources to continue.
Sign in to sync your library, watch progress, addons, and plugins across devices. Library sync uses Nuvio Sync when Trakt is not connected, and watch progress can use either Trakt or Nuvio Sync.
Sync across devices without creating an account.
Choose a discover catalog to browse
Try a different genre or catalog
No repositories added yet.\nAdd a repository to get started.
Audio passthrough (TrueHD, DTS, AC-3, etc.) is automatic. When connected to a compatible AV receiver or soundbar via HDMI, lossless audio is sent as-is without decoding.
System is up to date. Latest changes:
Could not save PIN. Try again.
Profile is locked. Try again in %1$ds.
Could not verify PIN. Try again.
This profile already has a PIN. Enter the current PIN to change it.
Use email and password to create or sign into your account.
Create a code on this device so other devices can link to it.
Link this device to another device using a sync code.
Create a code so other devices can sync with this account.
Connect to Wi-Fi or Ethernet to use this feature
Could not start server. All ports in use.
Device code already used. Start again.
Trakt is rate limiting requests. Try again in ~%1$d min
Trakt list not found or not public
Sign in with an account first.
No searchable catalogs found in installed addons
HDR support with canvas rendering. May block UI thread.
This will permanently delete \"%1$s\". This cannot be undone.
No collections yet. Create one to organize your catalogs.
Import collections from JSON. Catalogs from addons you don\'t have installed will show a warning.
Paste a collections JSON to import
File not found in Downloads.\nExport collections first to create it.
Reads nuvio-collections.json from the Downloads folder.
Show this collection above all regular home catalogs. Multiple pinned collections follow collection creation order.
Use the native TV glow on this collection\'s home-screen custom catalog cards
Combine all catalogs into one tab
Production company name, ID, or URL
Pick a ready-made source. You can edit or remove it after adding.
Paste a public TMDB list URL or only the number from the URL.
Search by studio name, or paste a TMDB company ID/URL and add it directly.
Enter a network ID. Common networks are available in Presets and quick filters.
Search a movie collection name or paste the collection ID from TMDB.
Enter a TMDB person ID or URL to build a row from cast credits.
Enter a TMDB person ID or URL to build a row from director credits.
Build a live TMDB row using optional filters. Leave fields empty when you do not need that filter.
Example: Star Wars Collection, Harry Potter Collection, or a collection URL.
Shown as the row/tab name. If blank, Nuvio creates one from the source.
Use TMDB genre numbers. Separate multiple with commas for AND, or pipes for OR.
Use this to avoid obscure low-vote titles. Example: 100.
Use two-letter language codes, for example en, ko, ja, hi.
Use two-letter country codes, for example US, KR, JP, IN.
Use TMDB keyword numbers. Quick chips fill common examples.
Use studio/company IDs. Quick chips fill common examples.
For series only. Use network IDs like Netflix 213 or HBO 49.
Use a four-digit year, for example 2024.
Enter a valid TMDB ID or URL
Enter a Trakt list ID or URL
Enter a Trakt list name, URL, or ID
Trakt list did not include a numeric ID
213 for Netflix, 49 for HBO, 2739 for Disney+
31 for Tom Hanks, or person URL
Animated GIF URL (plays only while focused)
Group catalogs into folders on your home screen
Search title, Trakt URL, or list ID
This will permanently delete \"%1$s\" and its contents.
Best Action Movies, Korean Dramas, 2024 Animation
213 for Netflix, 49 for HBO, 2739 for Disney+
\n\nThe stream source is blocked or restricted. Try a different source.
\n\nThe stream link has expired or been removed. Try a different source.
\n\nThe stream link has expired. Try a different source.
\n\nToo many requests to the stream source. Wait a moment and try again.
\n\nThe stream server is currently unavailable. Try a different source.
Source error: The stream source returned invalid or unplayable content. The link may have expired or the server returned an error page instead of video.\n\nTry a different source. [%1$s]
This stream uses a format your device may not support. Try a different source. [%1$s]
No subtitle lines were found in this file.
Collection \"%1$s\", folder \"%2$s\": \"sources\" must be an array
Collection \"%1$s\", folder \"%2$s\", source %3$d: missing required fields
Collection \"%1$s\", folder \"%2$s\", source %3$d: missing TMDB source type
Collection \"%1$s\", folder \"%2$s\", source %3$d: missing Trakt list ID
Missing compatible IDs for Trakt list operation
Trakt list limit reached. Upgrade required.
Insufficient Trakt IDs to mark watched
Failed to mark watched on Trakt (%1$d)
Failed to update episode watched status
fast.com: token not found in bundle
TorrServer process died on startup (exit code %1$d)
returned no metadata for this id
could not reach the addon server
the addon uses an insecure HTTP connection blocked by Android
returned no streams for this id
could not reach the addon server
the addon uses an insecure HTTP connection blocked by Android
